items.claim: Abdul Hussein leaves himself open a lot with his hands down and chin in the air when throwing combos.
items.quote: Tries to overwhelm you with combos but he just leaves himself open a lot. Hands are down, chin in the air.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is coming off a first-round knockout win over Tyson Nam where he showed good head movement and landed a right hand counter.
items.quote: He's coming off a knockout against Tyson Nam in the first round. It was a beautiful counter he hit him with.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein took down Muhammad Mokaev a few times in their 2021 fight.
items.quote: And his latest loss was to Muhammad Mokai in 2021... And he actually took down Mokayv a few times.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is a well-rounded fighter with good wrestling and a strong submission game.
items.quote: He's a well-rounded fighter, good on the ground, good on the standup... His submission game is absolutely no joke though. His wrestling is pretty good.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is more well-rounded and has more finishing potential than Cody Gibson.
items.quote: I think he's much more well-rounded than Cody Gibson with a lot more finishing potential.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is too reckless and is going to get himself countered by Abdul Hussein.
items.quote: It's too reckless. I think Gibson is going to get himself countered by Abdul Hussein.

items.claim: Mike Davis looked awful in his fight against Zarrukh Adashev because he tried to wrestle too much.
items.quote: There was that one fight of his though when he fought for Zam. He looked awful in that one... But he kept trying to wrestle with him.

items.claim: Mike Davis has very, very good striking.
items.quote: And Mike Davis's striking is very, very good.

items.claim: Nursulton Ruziboev is a control wrestler who maintains top position but does not land a lot of damage or go for many submissions.
items.quote: He's a control wrestler. Doesn't land a lot of damage on the ground. Doesn't go for submissions that much.
